entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a host plant to resist damage from insect pests.

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach using molecular markers to select for desired traits.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding methods based on phenotypic selection.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding that utilizes molecular tools to improve crops.

entities.name: GENETIC LINKAGE MAPS
entities.description: Maps showing the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome.

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome.

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Units of heredity that can confer resistance to insects.

entities.name: LINKAGE DRAG
entities.description: The unintentional transfer of unwanted genes during the introgression of a target gene.

entities.name: EPISTASIS
entities.description: The interaction between different genes that can affect the expression of a trait.

entities.name: DURABLE RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance that remains effective over a long period and across different environments.
